vulnerabilities.description: Rollup bundler is vulnerable to a code injection vulnerability via crafted module paths in the bundle process.
vulnerabilities.detail: Affects rollup@4.57.1. Fixed in rollup@4.59.0. This is a dev-time build dependency and is not exploitable in the deployed playwright-mcp runtime.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Upgrade rollup to >=4.59.0 or use npm overrides.

vulnerabilities.description: Prototype pollution vulnerability in ajv JSON schema validator via the $data option.
vulnerabilities.detail: Affects ajv@8.17.1 (transitive via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk). Fixed in ajv@8.18.0. The $data option is not used in playwright-mcp, reducing direct exploitability.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Upgrade ajv to >=8.18.0 or use npm overrides.

vulnerabilities.description: Timing attack vulnerability in Hono web framework authentication middleware.
vulnerabilities.detail: Affects hono@4.11.8 (transitive via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk). Fixed in hono@4.11.10. The auth middleware is not used in playwright-mcp's MCP transport layer.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Upgrade hono to >=4.11.10 or use npm overrides.
